description: Sleek SaaS analytics data warehouse — 3 core tables covering customer, revenue, and churn dimensions

customers.description: Customer master table. One row per customer. Contains customer profile, acquisition, and lifetime value information.

columns.market: Operating market: SG (Singapore), HK (Hong Kong), AU (Australia), UK (United Kingdom)
columns.segment: Customer segment based on company size: Startup (2-8 employees), SME (8-40 employees), Corporate (40-150 employees)
columns.plan: Subscription plan: Starter (basic accounting + compliance), Growth (+ payroll), Full Compliance (all services)
columns.acquisition_channel: How customer was acquired: Organic (SEO/content), Paid (ads), Referral (existing customer referral), Partner (accounting firm / bank referral)
columns.is_foreign_founder: Boolean — whether the company founder is a foreign national, affects incorporation fee
columns.headcount: Number of employees, used to calculate Payroll MRR
columns.cac: Customer acquisition cost in USD — total marketing/sales spend to acquire this customer
columns.churn_date: Month customer churned in YYYY-MM format, null if still active
columns.ltv: Cumulative revenue generated by this customer to date in USD

monthly_revenue.description: Monthly recurring revenue by customer and product. One row per customer per product per month. Excludes one-time Incorporation fees for MRR analysis.

columns.market: Operating market: SG, HK, AU, UK
columns.plan: Subscription plan at time of billing: Starter, Growth, Full Compliance
columns.product: Product line: Accounting (bookkeeping + reporting), Compliance (corporate secretarial + regulatory), Payroll (payroll processing, Growth and Full Compliance only), Incorporation (one-time company registration fee, appears in first month only)
columns.mrr: Monthly recurring revenue in USD for this product. For Incorporation, this is the one-time setup fee.
columns.event_type: Revenue event classification: new (first payment), active (renewal, no change), expansion (plan upgrade), churn (cancelled, MRR=0)

monthly_churn.description: One row per churned customer. Captures churn timing, financial impact, and reason. Use this table for churn analysis, cohort analysis, and retention investigations.

columns.churn_month: Month customer churned in YYYY-MM format
columns.market: Operating market at time of churn: SG, HK, AU, UK
columns.segment: Customer segment at time of churn: Startup, SME, Corporate
columns.plan: Subscription plan at time of churn: Starter, Growth, Full Compliance
columns.tenure_months: Number of months customer was active before churning. Higher tenure = more loyal customer lost.
columns.mrr_lost: Average monthly MRR lost due to this churn in USD
columns.churn_reason_category: Categorized churn reason: Price (too expensive), Product (missing features / bugs), Competition (switched to competitor), Unknown (no reason given)

key_metrics_guide.MRR: Sum of monthly_revenue.mrr WHERE product != 'Incorporation' AND event_type != 'churn'
key_metrics_guide.Churn Rate: COUNT(monthly_churn) / COUNT(active customers at start of period)
